name: J P Morgan Chase & Co Depositary Shares each representing a 1/400th interest in a share of 6.00% Non-Cumulative  Preferred Stock Series EE
summary: This ticker represents a depositary share, each representing a 1/400th interest in a share of JPMorgan Chase & Co's 6.00% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series EE. It signifies ownership in a specific class of preferred stock issued by JPMorgan Chase & Co, offering a fixed dividend payment.
